calendar.matters:
DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for Defendant's motion to set aside default and default judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Court Reporter: Alyssa Pacheco, CSR #13391, 209-679-3571, castilloalyssa85@yaho.com

Plaintiff Brandon Bakhshi represented by Peter Magganas, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Lucy McAlister represented by Davis J. Reilly, Esq.

Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is argued.
Matter is submitted.

Court Finds: There is no clear prayer for relief in Plaintiff's Complaint and Plaintiff did not file a Statement of Damages. Therefore, Judgment is VOID.

Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is GRANTED.
Default entered on 04/10/2019 and Default Judgment entered on 12/27/2021 are hereby SET ASIDE.
Defendant Mucy McAllister shall file it's Answer within 10 days.

Proposed order is signed and filed this date.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is transferred to department 514 to be heard by the honorable Murlene Randle on October 6, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. Parties are ordered to provide courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 514 no later than September 1, 2022 with cover letters reflecting the new hearing date and department.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Declaration Of Plaintiffs Iso App For Def Judg
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendants Lucy McAllister and Lucy S. McAllister Revocable Trust.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:43 a.m.

Peter A. Magganas, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Brandon Bakhshi, Leland Chamlin, Markus Beissinger and Emon Motamedi, who were placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Maggans, Bakhshi, Chamlin, Beissinger and Motamedi all appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
Mr. Magganas also appeared on behalf of plaintiff Nish Budhraja, who was not present.
No appearance by defendants Lucy McAllister or Lucy S. McAllister Revocable Trust.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Damages and Injunctive Relief was filed on February 11, 2019.
Substitute service on defendants Lucy McAllister and Lucy S. McAllister Revocable Trust occurred on February 26, 2019, and was effectuated on March 8, 2019.
Default as to both defendants was entered on April 10, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 2, 2021.

Plaintiffs Brandon Bakhshi, Leland Chamlin, Markus Beissinger, Emon Motamedi and Nish Budhraja submit the following exhibits for the Court's review:
